programme.title: Click
programme.desc: Spencer Kelly takes a high speed ride with Sam Schmidt a former Indycar racer, paralysed in a crash who has developed technology which allows him to race once more.

programme.title: Wonders of Greece
programme.desc: Sparta and Epidaurus,In the first of two episodes, Bettany Hughes travels to Greece, home to epic human stories and the birthplace of a culture that helped to change the way the world thinks.

programme.title: Emin/Munch: Between the Clock and the Bed
programme.desc: A look at the affinities between Edvard Munch and Tracey Emin, exploring the unexpected ways that the Norwegian expressionist resonates with one of Britain's pre-eminent artists.

programme.desc: Foreign correspondents currently posted to London look at events in the UK through outsiders' eyes, and at how the issues of the week are being tackled around the world.

programme.title: BBC World News
programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Uncovering Canada's Buried Past
programme.desc: For over a hundred years, more than 150,000 indigenous children were taken from their families and placed in compulsory boarding schools throughout Canada.

programme.title: The Engineers: Clean Energy
programme.desc: Three engineers leading the field in clean energy solutions come together for a special event presented by Kevin Fong at the Victoria and Albert Museum, London.

programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Future of Fashion
programme.desc: Halima Aden, the world's first hijab wearing supermodel meets US fashion designer Tommy Hilfiger to talk diversity, and how to go beyond tokenism to see real change.

programme.title: BBC World News
programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Talking Business Asia
programme.desc: Tokyo becomes the first city to host the Olympics during the pandemic. It's controversial decision, opposed by many in Japan due to fears it may turn into a super spreader event.

programme.desc: The latest international news from the BBC.

programme.desc: Talking Movies reports from the French Riviera looking at highlights from this month's Cannes Film Festival including interviews with top stars and directors.
